reviews.comment:
Un desastre tienen una sola persona haciendo todo, en plena temporada alta, cuadras de filas de autos que no avanzan nunca.

(Translated by Google)
It's a disaster; they have only one person doing everything, in the middle of peak season, blocks of lines of cars that never move.

reviews.comment:
Amable atencion. De 8 surtidores solo 4 en uso, eso genera demora. Lo compensa la amabilidad del personal

(Translated by Google)
Friendly service. Of the 8 pumps, only 4 were in use, which caused a delay. The staff's friendliness more than made up for it.

reviews.comment:
La atención no es mala pero siempre hay cola para cargar combustible y es lenta. Este año tuve inconvenientes 2 veces para revisar aire gomas xq los vehículos acceden desordenadamente desde 2 calles laterales y se generan problemas xq el orden del turno. Además encontré 4x4 enormes revisando presión neumáticos que, seguramente, las habían usado en arena x lo que tenían las gomas con muy baja presión y volver a llevarlas a presión normal demandaba unos 15 minutos. Espera infumable para quienes debíamos esperar. No deberían permitir eso (y además solo revisaban presión y no cargaron combustible. Es decir al ACA no le dejaron un $$)

(Translated by Google)
The service isn't bad, but there's always a line to get fuel, and it's slow. This year, I had problems twice getting my tires checked because vehicles enter haphazardly from two side streets, creating issues with the order of service. I also saw huge 4x4s checking their tire pressure; they'd probably been driving in sand, so their tires were very low, and getting them back to normal pressure took about 15 minutes. The wait was unbearable for those of us who had to wait. They shouldn't allow that (and besides, they were only checking tire pressure and not filling up the tank. In other words, the ACA didn't get a penny).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5NF9TdWRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Rebién,  siempre lavo el auto ahí y cargo nafta. Con el lavado hay turno. Para cargar nafta siempre hay mucha gente y quizás pocos playeros

(Translated by Google)
Great, I always wash my car there and fill up with gas. You have to take a number for the car wash. There are always a lot of people at the gas station and maybe not enough attendants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5dzRlTnVnRRAB
